_comment: Now Playing from Music (then Spotify) via osascript. Needs macOS Automation permission — approve the one-time prompt to let BarShelf read the current track. The command is brace-free so it doesn't collide with ${…} interpolation.

command: t=$(/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "Music" to if it is running and player state is playing then (name of current track) & " - " & (artist of current track)' 2>/dev/null | /usr/bin/tr -d '"'); [ -z "$t" ] && t=$(/usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "Spotify" to if it is running and player state is playing then (name of current track) & " - " & (artist of current track)' 2>/dev/null | /usr/bin/tr -d '"'); [ -z "$t" ] && t="Nothing playing"; echo '{"track":"'"$t"'"}'
